title: iberis semperflorens
intro: Iberis semperflorens, also known as the candytuft or rock candy, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its pink or white flowers that bloom throughout the year. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Iberis semperflorens include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and soothing digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in natural medicine. Iberis semperflorens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal blends to enhance its medicinal properties.
